system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_quytrinh_sanpham_getbyorder","body":"
CREATE PROC TR_QUYTRINH_SANPHAM_GETBYORDER(@madonhang nvarchar(200))
AS
SELECT D.daucay1
	, D.daucay2
	, D.canh1
	, D.canh2
	, D.mat1
	, D.mat2
	, D.vitri_khac
	, CASE WHEN D.daucay1 <> '' THEN C.soluong_tc * A.order_qty ELSE 0 END AS daucay1_qty
	, CASE WHEN D.daucay2 <> '' THEN C.soluong_tc * A.order_qty ELSE 0 END AS daucay2_qty
	, CASE WHEN D.canh1 <> '' THEN C.soluong_tc * A.order_qty ELSE 0 END AS canh1_qty
	, CASE WHEN D.canh2 <> '' THEN C.soluong_tc * A.order_qty ELSE 0 END AS canh2_qty
	, CASE WHEN D.mat1 <> '' THEN C.soluong_tc * A.order_qty ELSE 0 END AS mat1_qty
	, CASE WHEN D.mat2 <> '' THEN C.soluong_tc * A.order_qty ELSE 0 END AS mat2_qty
	, CASE WHEN D.vitri_khac <> '' THEN C.soluong_tc * A.order_qty ELSE 0 END AS vitri_khac_qty
INTO #TEMP
FROM tr_order_detail A
	INNER JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.item_number = B.masp
	LEFT JOIN tr_dinhmuc_govan C ON A.item_number = C.masp
	INNER JOIN tr_quytrinh_sanpham D ON C.masp = D.masp AND C.mact = D.mact
WHERE A.order_number = @madonhang
	AND C.mact <> '000'


SELECT quytrinh, daucay1, daucay2, canh1, canh2, mat1, mat2, vitri_khac
FROM (
	SELECT daucay1 as quytrinh, SUM(daucay1_qty) as soluong, 'daucay1' as phanloai
	FROM #TEMP
	WHERE daucay1 <> ''
	GROUP BY daucay1
	UNION ALL
	SELECT daucay2, SUM(daucay2_qty), 'daucay2'
	FROM #TEMP
	WHERE daucay2 <> ''
	GROUP BY daucay2
	UNION ALL
	SELECT canh1, SUM(canh1_qty), 'canh1'
	FROM #TEMP
	WHERE canh1 <> ''
	GROUP BY canh1
	UNION ALL
	SELECT canh2, SUM(canh2_qty), 'canh2'
	FROM #TEMP
	WHERE canh2 <> ''
	GROUP BY canh2
	UNION ALL
	SELECT mat1, SUM(mat1_qty), 'mat1'
	FROM #TEMP
	WHERE mat1 <> ''
	GROUP BY mat1
	UNION ALL
	SELECT mat2, SUM(mat2_qty), 'mat2'
	FROM #TEMP
	WHERE mat2 <> ''
	GROUP BY mat2
	UNION ALL
	SELECT vitri_khac, SUM(vitri_khac_qty), 'vitri_khac'
	FROM #TEMP
	WHERE vitri_khac <> ''
	GROUP BY vitri_khac
) as a
PIVOT
(
	SUM(soluong) FOR phanloai IN (daucay1, daucay2, canh1, canh2, mat1, mat2, vitri_khac)
) AS PIV
	

DROP TABLE #TEMP

","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_quytrinh_sanpham","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
